checks.name: compose_config
checks.outputPreview:
networks:
      default: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        target: 8000
        published: "8000"
        protocol: tcp
  frontend:
    build:
      context: D:\HuaweiMoveData\Users\别碰我的电脑\Documents\New project
      dockerfile: Dockerfile.frontend
    depends_on:
      backend:
        condition: service_healthy
        required: true
    environment:
      ADMIN_EDITOR_TOKEN: dev-editor-token
      ADMIN_TOKEN: dev-admin-token
      ADMIN_VIEW_TOKEN: dev-view-token
      AI_PROVIDER: local
      AI_TRACE: "false"
      BACKEND_URL: http://backend:8000
      DEEPSEEK_API_KEY: ""
      DEEPSEEK_BASE_URL: https://api.deepseek.com
      DEEPSEEK_MODEL: deepseek-v4-pro
      DEEPSEEK_REASONING_EFFORT: medium
      DEEPSEEK_TIMEOUT_SECONDS: "45"
    networks:
      default: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        target: 3000
        published: "3000"
        protocol: tcp
  postgres:
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: law_assistant
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: law_password
      POSTGRES_USER: law
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - pg_isready -U law -d law_assistant
      timeout: 5s
      interval: 10s
      retries: 10
      start_period: 20s
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    networks:
      default: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        target: 5432
        published: "5432"
        protocol: tcp
    volumes:
      - type: volume
        source: postgres-data
        target: /var/lib/postgresql/data
        volume: {}
networks:
  default:
    name: newproject_default
volumes:
  postgres-data:
    name: newproject_postgres-data

checks.name: prod_compose_config
checks.outputPreview:
source: caddy-config
        target: /config
        volume: {}
  frontend:
    build:
      context: D:\HuaweiMoveData\Users\别碰我的电脑\Documents\New project
      dockerfile: Dockerfile.frontend
    depends_on:
      backend:
        condition: service_healthy
        required: true
    environment:
      ADMIN_EDITOR_TOKEN: dev-editor-token
      ADMIN_TOKEN: dev-admin-token
      ADMIN_VIEW_TOKEN: dev-view-token
      AI_PROVIDER: local
      AI_TRACE: "false"
      BACKEND_URL: http://backend:8000
      DEEPSEEK_API_KEY: ""
      DEEPSEEK_BASE_URL: https://api.deepseek.com
      DEEPSEEK_MODEL: deepseek-v4-pro
      DEEPSEEK_REASONING_EFFORT: medium
      DEEPSEEK_TIMEOUT_SECONDS: "45"
    networks:
      app_net:
        ipv4_address: 172.30.0.10
    restart: unless-stopped
  postgres:
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: law_assistant
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: law_password
      POSTGRES_USER: law
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - pg_isready -U law -d law_assistant
      timeout: 5s
      interval: 10s
      retries: 10
      start_period: 20s
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    networks:
      app_net:
        ipv4_address: 172.30.0.12
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - type: volume
        source: postgres-data
        target: /var/lib/postgresql/data
        volume: {}
networks:
  app_net:
    name: newproject_app_net
    ipam:
      config:
        - subnet: 172.30.0.0/24
volumes:
  caddy-config:
    name: newproject_caddy-config
  caddy-data:
    name: newproject_caddy-data
  postgres-data:
    name: newproject_postgres-data
